mapper.select:
select campaign_no, campaign_title, campaign_status, campaign_goal_member, to_char(campaign_start_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') as campaign_start_date, to_char(campaign_expire_date - interval '1' day,'yyyy-mm-dd') as campaign_expire_date from create_campaign_tbl where campaign_status in (1,2,3,4)
and campaign_title like '%' || #{campaignTitle} || '%'
and member_id like '%' || #{campaignTitle} || '%'
and campaign_status in(1,2)
and campaign_status in(3,4)
order by campaign_expire_date desc
order by campaign_expire_date asc
offset #{page} * #{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only

select campaign_title, campaign_status, campaign_explanation, campaign_goal_member, campaign_start_date, campaign_expire_date, member_id, (select count(*) from campaign_member_tbl where campaign_no=#{campaignNo})as member_count from create_campaign_tbl ct where campaign_no = #{campaignNo}
select member_id from campaign_member_tbl where campaign_no = #{campaignNo}
mapper.update: update create_campaign_tbl set campaign_status=#{campaignStatus} where campaign_no=#{campaignNo}
mapper.select: select campaign_no,campaign_status,campaign_goal_member,campaign_expire_date,(select count(*) from campaign_member_tbl cmt where cmt.campaign_no=cct.campaign_no) as member_count, member_id from create_campaign_tbl cct
mapper.insert: insert into campaign_participance_tbl values( campaign_participance_seq.nextval, #{campaignThumb}, #{campaignMemo}, #{campaignNo}, sysdate, to_timestamp(#{campaignExpireDate}), #{memberId} )
mapper.select: select count(*) from campaign_participance_tbl where campaign_no = #{campaignNo}
select * from campaign_participance_tbl where campaign_no =#{campaignNo} offset #{page} * #{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only
select total_point from member_point_tbl where member_id=#{memberId}
mapper.update: update member_point_tbl set total_point = total_point + #{pointChange} where member_id=#{memberId}
update create_campaign_tbl set member_id=#{memberId} where campaign_no=#{campaignNo}
mapper.delete: delete from campaign_member_tbl where member_id=#{memberId} and campaign_no=#{campaignNo}
mapper.select: select member_id from campaign_exile_tbl where campaign_no = #{campaignNo}

select campaign_notice_no,campaign_notice_title,campaign_notice_writer,campaign_notice_date,campaign_no ,(select campaign_title from create_campaign_tbl cct where cct.campaign_no = cnt.campaign_no) as campaign_title from campaign_notice_tbl cnt order by campaign_notice_date desc offset #{size} * #{page} rows fetch next #{size} rows only
select campaign_status from create_campaign_tbl where campaign_no = #{campaignNo}
mapper.update: update create_campaign_tbl set campaign_status = 5 where campaign_no = #{campaignNo}
mapper.select: select campaign_no, campaign_title, campaign_goal_member, campaign_expire_date, campaign_start_date, member_id, (select count(*) from campaign_member_tbl cmt where cmt.campaign_no = cct.campaign_no) as member_count from create_campaign_tbl cct where campaign_status in(1,2) order by member_count desc offset 0 rows fetch next 10 rows only

select campaign_notice_title,campaign_notice_writer,campaign_notice_no,campaign_no from campaign_notice_tbl where campaign_notice_date > sysdate - interval '10' day offset 0 rows fetch next 5 rows only

select campaign_notice_no, campaign_notice_title, campaign_notice_content, campaign_notice_writer, campaign_notice_date, (select campaign_title from create_campaign_tbl cct where cct.campaign_no = cnt.campaign_no) as campaign_title from campaign_notice_tbl cnt where campaign_notice_no = #{campaignNoticeNo}

select count(*) from create_campaign_tbl where campaign_status in (1,2,3,4)
and campaign_title like '%' || #{campaignTitle} || '%'
and member_id like '%' || #{campaignTitle} || '%'
and campaign_status in(1,2)
and campaign_status in(3,4)
